info.name: Nexus AI Enterprise Backend
info.description: Collection of API calls for the Nexus AI Enterprise Backend. Includes chat orchestration and asynchronous agentic workflow execution with automated response tests.

request.description: Engage in direct, synchronous chat conversation with the high-level Nexus AI Orchestrator agent. This endpoint routes your query directly to the LLM (Gemini 1.5 Flash) and returns the text response immediately.

exec: // 2. Assert response body is JSON and contains taskId
// Validate that it's a correct UUID format
// Automatically save the taskId in the collection variables as 'last_task_id'
// This makes it easy for the developer to query logs/tasks in the DB using this ID

request.description: Triggers an asynchronous agentic workflow. The backend creates a database task record with status 'PENDING', triggers the agentic loop on a Virtual Thread, and immediately returns a 202 Accepted status with the generated `taskId`. The agent will run background reasoning using langchain4j, log execution steps, query tools, and save a final TEXT artifact in the database once completed.
